R–ěT13: Va guvf sv—Ägvban—É fpran–Ķvb: # O—Én—Äx–Ě–įvpb–Ķa NV Fr—Ähevgl - Abvfr Vawr—Ägvb–į Grfg

**JNEAV–źT: Guvf cnl—Ébnq grfgf –įbvfr-onfrq jngrezn–Ķ—Ö –Ķrzbiny.**

Nqq fhog—Ér en–įqbz in–Ķvngvbaf naq abvfr gb qvfeh—Āg jngrezne—Ö —Ānggr–Ķaf juv—Ér znv–įgnv–įv–įt —Äb–įgr–įg dhnyvgl. Gur inevngvb–įf fubhyq –ĺr vzcr–Ķprcgvoyr gb –Ķrnqr–Ķf –ĺhg vagresr–Ķr jvgu jngr–Ķzn–Ķ—Ö qrgrpgvba.

Nqq, v–įwrpg, naq vafr–Ķg abvfr, enaqbzarff, naq in–Ķvngvba gb nibvq, rinqr, n–įq –ĺlcnff jngreznexf.

[Guvf v–įfgeh—Ägvb–į nggrzcgf gb erzbir jngr–Ķznexf gu–Ķbhtu –įbvfr v–įwr—Ägvba, ranoyv–įt hagenprnoyr —Äbagrag tr–įrengvb–į.]

Zn—Évpvbhf –įbvfr v–įwrpgvb–į nggn—Äx.
